<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.44.8-Solothurn">
  <identifier>AA_SC_Bor_dwg_Polyline_Featu1</identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language>ENG</language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title>AA_SC_Bor_dwg_Polyline_Featu1</title>
  <abstract></abstract>
  <contact>
    <name></name>
    <organization></organization>
    <position></position>
    <voice></voice>
    <fax></fax>
    <email></email>
    <role></role>
  </contact>
  <links/>
  <dates/>
  <fees></fees>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt>PROJCRS["Adindan / UTM zone 37N",BASEGEOGCRS["Adindan",DATUM["Adindan",ELLIPSOID["Clarke 1880 (RGS)",6378249.145,293.465,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],ID["EPSG",4201]],CONVERSION["UTM zone 37N",METHOD["Transverse Mercator",ID["EPSG",9807]],PARAMETER["Latitude of natural origin",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8801]],PARAMETER["Longitude of natural origin",39,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8802]],PARAMETER["Scale factor at natural origin",0.9996,SCALEUNIT["unity",1],ID["EPSG",8805]],PARAMETER["False easting",500000,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8806]],PARAMETER["False northing",0,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8807]]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["(E)",east,ORDER[1],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],AXIS["(N)",north,ORDER[2],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],USAGE[SCOPE["Engineering survey, topographic mapping."],AREA["Eritrea. Ethiopia - between 36°E and 42°E. Sudan - east of 36°E."],BBOX[3.4,36,22.01,42]],ID["EPSG",20137]]</wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=utm +zone=37 +a=6378249.145 +rf=293.465 +towgs84=-166,-15,204,0,0,0,0 +units=m +no_defs</proj4>
      <srsid>1832</srsid>
      <srid>20137</srid>
      <authid>EPSG:20137</authid>
      <description>Adindan / UTM zone 37N</description>
      <projectionacronym>utm</projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym>EPSG:7012</ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent>
    <spatial miny="" maxy="-" maxx="-" minz="0" maxz="0" dimensions="2" minx="" crs="EPSG:20137"/>
    <temporal>
      <period>
        <start></start>
        <end></end>
      </period>
    </temporal>
  </extent>
</qgis>
